rationale: In the conceptual framework section, the cited work is used when the authors define perceptual versus conceptual processing routes, which is central to their theorizing. This is not just a passing background citation; it supports the mechanism linking stimulus-based versus memory-based evaluation to different price representations. Although it appears with other references, it helps ground the hypotheses and interpretation of the left-digit bias effects.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Lee and Labroo (2004) as part of the conceptual foundation for the perceptual-versus-conceptual processing distinction. It then uses that distinction to explain when left-digit bias should be stronger or weaker in price evaluations.
